2026-04-17T07:18:05.9384359Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-17T07:18:05.9385346Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
